title: Cobblemon - Poke Legends
description: Pokemon Cobblemon Pack - QoL and Performance mods! The server included in the pack has Raids, Gyms, Mega Evolution, Tera, Alpha Bosses, Paradox, Legendary Pokemon, GTS and more!
body:
## 🚀 Join the #1 Cobblemon Community Today ## If you love **Minecraft** + **Pokémon**, this is where you belong. **Poke Legends** is a fully developed multiplayer Cobblemon world with real competition, real progression, and a thriving community. **🎮 Download the modpack → Hit Multiplayer → Join mc.poke-legends.com** Join our **Discord** to become part of the community! _(Check the right side or bottom of page on mobile.)_ ## 🌎 What Makes Poke Legends Different? ## This isn’t a singleplayer modpack you quit after two weeks. This is a **live multiplayer ecosystem:** - Real player gym leaders - Weekly tournaments - A global economy - Constant updates - Hundreds of players online daily You’re stepping into a world that’s already alive. ## 💬 Real Players. Real Stories. ## ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ “My favorite part of the server is the community. Since I arrived here on poke legends. I have not only made friends. But I have become part of a great big family.” — ItsZer0 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ “A lot of features on this server are very cohesive between minecraft, cobblemon, and multiplayer. The whole concept of player gyms is such a neat idea, and it's well executed. Admittedly my favorite part of the server is the economy, I love making shops 🤠” — adamitude ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐| “I started with no knowledge of competitive play, I began my journey to learn it in this server. I challenged myself to use only Bug-type Pokémon and eventually became good at it. This wouldn’t have happened if not for the server. o/” — Tadashji ## 🔥 Core Features ## ### 🧬 Complete Pokémon Experience ### ✅ ALL 1025 Pokémon (no fakemons, no missing mons) 🐉 Legendaries, Mythicals & Ultra Beasts spawn 💥 All Mega Evolutions (including Mega ZA) ⚡ Mega, Dynamax, Gigantamax, Terastallization, Z-Moves 🐲 Hundreds of rideable Pokémon 💿 All TMs, TRs & Move Tutors accessible
### 🏆 Competitive & Progression ### 🗼 Weekly tournaments with massive prizes 🛡️ Level 1–100 Battle Pass 🎯 Global bounty system (become the #1 Poke Hunter) 💪 Custom EV/IV training systems 🔎 PokeNav to track spawns
### 🌍 Two Unique Regions ### 🗺️ Oasis – Full survival experience (mobs enabled) 🌿 Serenity – Peaceful mode (no mobs, no hunger) 🏛️ 8 NPC Gym Leaders + Elite Four 🏛️ 18+ Real Player Gyms (yes, you can become one)
### 💰 Economy & Community ### 💵 Player-run shops & massive economy 🧢 100+ cosmetics (Shiny Sylveon Hat, Kyogre Sword & more) 🧸 2,000+ collectible Pokémon plushies 🐣 Advanced daycare breeding 💎 Weekly Shiny Saturday boost
### ⚔️ World Events & Bosses ### 💥 Alpha bosses with rare loot 🌑 50+ custom Shadow Pokémon ✨ Daily / Weekly / Monthly quests 🍛 Pokésnacks to boost shiny odds, catch rate & friendship
### 🛠 Performance & Quality of Life ### 📸 Built-in minimap to see Pokemon round you 🪧 REI recipe support ⛏️ Land protection claim + keep inventory 🔧 Performance optimizations for better fps 🌟 Regular updates & new content
# 🎮 Built on Cobblemon 1.7.3 # Latest version. Fully optimized. Ready to play.
# 📥 How To Join # 1. Download this modpack 2. Open Minecraft 3. Click Multiplayer 4. Join: mc.poke-legends.com 5. Then hop in Discord and introduce yourself. **Join Our Discord** to Become a Member of Our Community! _**(Check the Right Side)**_
📜 Full Text Description (Accessibility) Welcome to the **Poke Legends Oasis Region**! This official modpack is built for our Cobblemon server, giving you the ultimate Pokémon-in-Minecraft experience. ### Key Features: - **Rideable Cobblemon** – Fly, swim, and run across the world on your favorite Pokémon. - **Mega Evolutions & Dynamax** – Take battles to the next level with powerful transformations. - **Gym Battles** – Challenge leaders and prove your strength. - **Legendary Hunts & Shiny Boosts** – Rare encounters and improved shiny odds. - **Player Shops & Pokémon Cosmetics** – Trade, customize, and show off your style. - **EV Training & Move Tutors** – Build the perfect competitive team. - **Advanced Combat & Bounty Hunts** – Sharpen your skills with unique challenges. - **Poké Jobs, Alpha Bosses, and Gyms** – Earn rewards and face epic bosses. - **Daycare System & Plushies** – Breed Pokémon and collect adorable decorations. - **Optimizations** – Mods included to keep the game running smooth. ### How to Join: - **Server IP:** `mc.poke-legends.com` - Join our Discord for guides, events, and community help!
